summary: Completed comprehensive testing of user creation bug fix. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all 11 roles in dropdown and separate First Name/Last Name fields. Fixed vendor_ops access to supply review endpoint.

issues: React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - minor, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: UserRole enum correctly expanded to 11 roles: admin, sales, sales_manager, finance_manager, marketing, production, vendor_ops, staff, affiliate, vendor, customer
ROLE_PERMISSIONS dict correctly maps all 11 roles to their permissions
AdminUserCreate model correctly accepts first_name and last_name fields
create_admin_user endpoint correctly stores first_name, last_name, and constructs full_name
Frontend roleConfig correctly defines all 11 roles with labels, icons, colors, and descriptions
Role dropdown shows all 11 roles with descriptions (e.g., 'Vendor Ops — Supply & vendors')
Form correctly has separate First Name and Last Name input fields
Fixed: admin_supply_review_routes.py _get_admin function now includes vendor_ops and staff roles
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users for each role during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: User creation with all 11 roles fully tested. All roles work: admin, sales, sales_manager, finance_manager, marketing, production, vendor_ops, staff, affiliate, vendor, customer. Form uses first_name/last_name instead of full_name. vendor_ops users can now access supply review endpoint after fix to admin_supply_review_routes.py.

frontend_ui_tests: Admin Users page loads at /admin/users - PASSED
Add Staff User button visible and clickable - PASSED
First Name field present in form - PASSED
Last Name field present in form - PASSED
Role dropdown shows all 11 roles - PASSED
New roles visible: Vendor Ops, Staff, Affiliate, Vendor, Sales Manager, Finance - PASSED
Supply Review page loads at /admin/vendor-supply-review - PASSED

user_creation_with_all_roles.details: POST /api/admin/users accepts all 11 roles: admin, sales, sales_manager, finance_manager, marketing, production, vendor_ops, staff, affiliate, vendor, customer

structured_names.details: API accepts first_name and last_name separately, constructs full_name, and returns all three fields in response

role_validation.details: Invalid roles rejected with 422 error, default role (customer) assigned when omitted

vendor_ops_access.details: vendor_ops users can login and access /api/vendor-ops/* and /api/admin/vendor-supply/* endpoints

frontend_role_dropdown.details: Role dropdown shows all 11 roles with descriptions: Admin — Full access, Sales — Orders & customers, Sales Manager — Team lead + analytics, Finance — Payments & commissions, Marketing — Products & analytics, Production — Order status, Vendor Ops — Supply & vendors, Staff — General staff, Affiliate — Affiliate partner, Vendor — Vendor/Supplier, Customer — Regular user

frontend_name_fields.details: Form has separate First Name * and Last Name fields instead of single Full Name field

bug_fix_applied.issue: _get_admin function only allowed admin, sales, marketing roles
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added sales_manager, finance_manager, production, vendor_ops, staff to allowed roles
bug_fix_applied.impact: vendor_ops users can now access supply review dashboard
